sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Party-based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game features party-based exploration with multiple characters traveling together on overworld map

special_mechanics.name: Overworld Travel
special_mechanics.description: Large overworld map (16x size of Ultima III) with various means of travel and exploration

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data. Ultima IV is primarily a turn-based RPG with minimal documented platforming physics. The available Wikipedia source focuses on narrative, gameplay mechanics, and game design rather than low-level movement physics. No technical documentation of jump physics, gravity, acceleration, or sub-pixel systems exists in provided sources. Movement appears grid or turn-based rather than real-time physics-driven.
